content:
• Adds mystique to the class structure—students wonder what’s “behind the curtain.”

📌 Final Lock-In Questions for Version 5.3

1. Should XP decay over time if unused?

✔ Example: XP slowly expires if not used within three weeks.
✔ Prevents students from hoarding it for last-minute advantages.

2. Should students be able to permanently “change their archetype” mid-semester?

✔ Example: A one-time re-spec event where students can switch paths if they feel their play style doesn’t match their academic style.

3. Should there be a “Golden Ticket” hidden event that only one student can unlock?

✔ Example: If a student figures out a hidden Easter egg in the syllabus, they are granted one secret, special advantage for the final class showdown.

🚀 Version 5.3 now fully incorporates dual settings, POV adjustments, structured challenges, XP sacrifices, and unlockable achievements.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 161 (chunk 161/555)
